scripts.dev:all: concurrently -k -n web,admin,api,caddy -c blue,magenta,green,cyan "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:admin" "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:caddy"
scripts.dev:api: cd apps/api && if [ -x .venv/bin/uvicorn ]; then .venv/bin/uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 4000 --reload; else uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 4000 --reload; fi
scripts.migrate: cd apps/api && if [ -x .venv/bin/python ]; then .venv/bin/python -m app.db.migrate; else python3 -m app.db.migrate; fi
scripts.seed: cd apps/api && if [ -x .venv/bin/python ]; then .venv/bin/python -m app.db.seed; else python3 -m app.db.seed; fi
